revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[:Category:5世紀の日本|← 5世紀]] | [[:Category:7世紀の日本|7世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[6世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Co...'
revision.text:
[[:Category:5世紀の日本|← 5世紀]] | [[:Category:7世紀の日本|7世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[6世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Commons category|Japan in the 6th century}}
[[Category:6世紀の各国|にほん]] [[Category:各世紀の日本]] [[Category:6世紀のアジア史|にほん]] [[Category:古墳時代]]

[[:Category:5世紀の日本|← 5世紀]] | [[:Category:7世紀の日本|7世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[6世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Commons category|Japan in the 6th century}}
[[Category:6世紀の各国|にほん]] [[Category:各世紀の日本|06]] [[Category:6世紀のアジア史|にほん]] [[Category:古墳時代]]

[[:Category:5世紀の日本|← 5世紀]] | [[:Category:7世紀の日本|7世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[6世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Commons category|Japan in the 6th century}}
[[Category:6世紀の各国|にほん]] [[Category:各世紀の日本|06]] [[Category:6世紀のアジア|にほん]] [[Category:古墳時代]]

[[6世紀]]の[[日本]]に関するカテゴリ。

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:6世紀の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في القرن 6]] [[az:Category:VI əsrdə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:Japan in the 6th century]] [[es:Category:Japón en el siglo VI]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در سده ۶ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Japon au VIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:6-րդ դարը Ճապոնիայում]] [[ko:Category:6세기 일본]] [[pt:Category:Século VI no Japão]] [[sv:Category:Japan under 500-talet]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں چھٹی صدی]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:6th-century_Japanese_people]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6519331)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Japan}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6519331}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:6th century in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1st millennium in Japan]]
[[Category:6th century by country|Japan]]
[[Category:6th century in Asia|Japan]]
[[Category:Asuka period]]
[[Category:Centuries in Japan|06]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=6th_century_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
